I told my family that I try to get 9 hours of sleep and it created so much outrage that we were talking about it for ages.

artifacts.excerpt: a fascinating realisation I’ve had is that when you’re feeling a strong emotion, if you sit down and close your eyes and feel it, you will likely see a “random” memory, and if you investigate the memory, you realise that you were experiencing the same emotion in that memory.
